reason: The diff successfully migrates @nx/eslint and @nx/eslint-plugin to local dist builds by: (1) updating package.json files to point main/types to dist/ instead of src/, (2) adding proper exports maps with dist paths, (3) creating an internal.ts entry point for first-party consumers, (4) updating all internal imports across the monorepo to use @nx/eslint/internal instead of @nx/eslint/src/*, (5) adding a migration to rewrite subpath imports, and (6) configuring build outputs and tsconfig
